{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231449588BD5829901D54D4F96ED"}"},"total":1727},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7402554278811337534","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"可以一看，相对于其他末世流，虽然还保留重生的机制，但摒除了异能者，去掉了晶核，重新以一个普通重生者的视角走进了末世，除了后面的肉体强化有点超标，其他的基本都可以接受，节奏也很紧凑，剧情也比较新颖，对于人物塑造方面，我方人物有些过于优秀了，人无完人，有缺点才显得更加有血有肉。我相信，对细节方面加以补充完善，此文会变得更好。加油作者"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1723544670,"group_id":"7323881715288509502","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我只是一条粘锅的咸鱼","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+27UD8VkBQ+zrNJJ0AH9zQl6Tp0x+nRMLGnKct0/5jx","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4065730d80884fa383d6aa7d518a45fb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795537&x-signature=ftnTs9A01oQULjmOiDkk61YzDnc%3D","user_id":"1346220160191340","user_name":"八牛自月生"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1346220160191340","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7323881715288509502","book_info":{"abstract":"《无异能+无系统+天灾流+基地流+囤货流+种田流+群像+不虐主+杀伐果断》

朋友，看了那么多末世文。
是不是对那些乱七八糟的异能、无脑系统、美女倒贴产生审美疲劳了？
不妨过来看看现代普通人要如何打造出一个末世中符合逻辑的家园。
普通的多视角团体末世种田文。
普通人心目中的末世！
考虑过囤粮种类、储存时间、种植难度、年产量、人均消耗吗？
考虑过基地选址、围墙、水库、发电、种植场、养殖场、仓库、工厂、宿舍、实验室等吗？
考虑过末世前的武器准备，末世后的武器获得，还有枪械、子弹、炸药的生产制造吗？
考虑过合理获取无人机、商用直升机、武装直升机，各种人才、设备、能源吗？
考虑过如何科学布置基地防御圈，当亿万丧尸攻城时，狠狠坑杀的爽感吗？
考虑过丧尸没有心跳血液流动却可以走动，不吃东西却可以维持多年存在的原因吗？
考虑过废土末世中如何建立一个新的秩序吗？
如果你能静下心看下去。
这里或许会有一些不太成熟的答案。
要不
试试？

PS：多种天灾类型，丧尸会叠塔攻城，奔跑快速，嗅觉灵敏，白天较弱，夜晚变强，非老款散步类型。
（尽量真实的普通人末世，半无敌，安全第一，丧尸永远不会有智慧，幸存者的求生一直是主旋律，不虐主，另类爽文）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6b19d6461525b2a3794a4dbf05d310b2","author":"爱吃炒粉的西风","author_id":"","book_id":"7323881715288509502","book_name":"现代末世录","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7323881719520576062","read_count":"32334","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3551024"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"1692","tags":"科幻末世,重生,末世,求生,囤物资,末日求生","thumb_url":"https://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/001ab132d7ebcf811bbc7d193f2783e1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779432598&x-signature=dyrosRQ0KIwkm826WdZbvzth9AU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"698915846634936","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"346"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231449588BD5829901D54D4F96ED"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_coun
